relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/iPDC dissociation for scRNA sequencing.docx
full_text:
Harvesting iPDCs for scRNA sequencing

Collect the culture medium into a 1.5 ml Eppendorf (approx. 1200 ul from 4 wells), keep it aside, on ice. If there are different treatment conditions, collect them into separate tubes. Carefully aspirate the medium from the remaining wells using a suction pump.

Wash the wells 1x with cold sterile PBS.

Add 300uL/well DispaseII solution (Stock 50U, final concentration 1U/mL), prepared in tissue dissociation medium. 100ul of stock DISPASE in 4.9ml of the medium. Depending on the number of wells, calculate the volume of Dispase+medium. For example for 20 wells you need 6ml of Dispase+medium.

Incubate the plate in a cell culture incubator for 30 min.

During Dispase incubation time, spin the supernatant (collected at step 1.) at 1500 rpm for 10 min at +4C (Vähärautio centrifuge). Set the temperature of the cell culture centrifuge to +4C.

Collect the supernatant into a new clean Eppendorf, label the tube as Sample ID_iPDC_culture days(d6)_control/treated_date_initials. and store at -80C in a box named ONCOSYS-OVA cell culture supernatant -80C.

After the incubation time, bring the plate back into the laminar and break the ome-gel by pipetting up and down several times using a 1 mL pipet, transfer the content from the wells into 15 ml falcons: pool wells from the same condition. Centrifuge at 1200 rpm for 5 min at +4 (cell culture centrifuge).

Remove the supernatant from step 7, add 5 mL of 1x with cold sterile 1xPBS (in +4C fridge in cell culture room). Centrifuge at 1200 rpm for 5 min at +4 cell culture room.

Remove supernatant from stem 8, and add 1ml of stem cell banker to the pellet, mix well, and transfer to pre-labelled cryo tubes. Keep the cryo tubes in a freezing box, and transfer the box to -80. Note down the position of the tubes and box name, for updating in the sample inventory sheet.

Samples for Flow - using Dispase + DMEM/F12:

Carefully aspirate the medium from the remaining wells using a suction pump.

Wash the wells 1x with RT sterile PBS.

Add 50 U/mL dispase stock to prewarmed DMEM-F12 (with HEPES, pen/strep and glutamax) to a final concentration of 1 U/mL.

For 48-well plate drops (40 uL each) use 300 uL of dispase + DMEM/F12 per well; e.g. mix 6 uL of 50 U/mL dispase stock and 294 uL DMEM/F12

After adding the dispase, detach the matrix from the well bottom by using a spatula.

Incubate at +37C for 20 mins. After the incubation, bring the plate back to laminar and pipet with a 1 mL pipet the content up and down for a couple of times to disrupt the drop. Continue the incubation for another 10-15 mins. NOTE! Do not exceed the time, since it can be harmful to the (immune) cells.

Transfer the content from all the wells into a 15 mL falcon and spin at 400g for 6 min at +4 (cell culture centrifuge). Remove the supernatant and add 900 uL of FACS staining buffer per condition (e.g. if having 2x 6 wells for STAINED and UNSTAINED, add 1´800 uL of staining buffer)

Carefully resuspend the pellet into the staining buffer and transfer the suspension into a corresponding number of 1.5 mL Eppendorfs.

Centrifuge at 400g for 6 min at +4 (Vähärautio centrifuge) and immediately proceed with flow cytometry protocol
